targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: BME680 Humidity
panels.description: Indoor relative humidity. Bands (EPA/ASHRAE-style comfort/mold-risk guidance): <30% Too Dry, 30-55% Comfortable, 55-60% Borderline, 60-70% Humid (mold risk), >70% Very Humid.
